name: Revenue Recipes
description: Enriches revenue events with normalized, queryable revenue metrics (monthly-normalized MRR contribution, movement type, period month, kind) so MRR/expansion/churn are answerable directly in PostHog insights and SQL — no external service required.

config.markdown: Configure how your revenue events are shaped. This app reads the event named below and adds `rr_*` properties to it. It never drops or redirects events.

config.name: Revenue event name
config.hint: Only events with this name are enriched. Others pass through untouched.

config.name: Amount property
config.hint: Event property holding the charged amount (negative for refunds).

config.name: Currency property
config.hint: Event property holding the ISO currency code.

config.name: Subscription property
config.hint: Presence of this property marks the charge as a subscription (vs one-off).

config.name: Billing interval property
config.hint: Event property holding 'month' or 'year'. Used to normalize annual charges to MRR.

config.name: Default currency
config.hint: Used when the currency property is absent.
